loc.syn: A talk show that discusses the lives of celebrities and viral events. Feni Rose will discuss all issues surrounding idol artists, but in a different way. The artists in question will be invited to the studio to talk openly without anything being hidden.
A short news program that delivers the latest updates from Indonesia and around the world.
With Qatar’s iconic night-race atmosphere, fans are treated to breathtaking overtakes, intense rider duels, and thrilling moments all around the track.

This starting lineup reflects the intense competition of MotoGP, where time differences between riders are razor-thin. Every starting spot could be critical in deciding who will stand on the podium at the Qatar main race.
Moto3 Qatar 2025 is set to be packed with spectacular moments, fierce competition, and intense battles at every corner!
This event marks one of the highlights of the WorldSBK season, featuring the world's top riders battling at a legendary venue.

Riders push their limits to secure leading positions and crucial championship points. With Marc Márquez leading the standings and Francesco Bagnaia aiming to maintain his dominance at Jerez, this race serves as a testament to strategy and resilience.
Following this round, Bautista extended his lead in the riders' championship to 74 points over Razgatlioglu.
Following this round, Bautista extended his lead in the riders' championship to 74 points over Razgatlioglu.

A backup girl becomes the strongest and most popular girl? This happened in the story of Jelly who liked someone but her love story was not as beautiful as her sister's because she saw her sister as better but instead accidentally met a rich guy.

Kirana accidentally bumped into Wisnu's mother, but she hid it to avoid blame. The encounter brought the two closer. However, Wisnu unexpectedly discovered that it was Kirana who had bumped into his mother.
A news program that presents a collection of current reports from within the country and abroad.
While delivering a catfish order, Devi nearly hit Joni while driving while talking on the phone. At that moment, Devi's uncle called to tell her that her father had died.

It started with Syila and Odi meeting at a graduation venue. Syila thought that Odi was Rio, who was her mother's chosen man. Odi admitted that he was the man she was looking for and had an arranged marriage with. Odi also admitted that he was an online motorcycle taxi entrepreneur, even though Odi was just an ordinary employee. Odi told Rio that Syila was an unattractive woman. Odi indeed fell in love at first sight with Syila, even though Syila lied to him that he was the son of his father's best friend.
Three young men in love must choose between a girl who is infatuated with him or a girl who can only hide her feelings. Who will Fattah choose to fill his youthful love story?

Khansa, a gentle and devout woman, navigates life with sacrifices she never chose. Her kindness, however, drags her into a series of wounds, slander, and secrets from her past that are slowly revealed.
Each episode features true or fictional tales that convey values of kindness, love, and friendship, inviting viewers to reflect and appreciate the beautiful moments in life.
Watch Today's Special True Story.
Each episode highlights glimpses of public figures’ lives, personal stories and conflicts, and current trends delivered in a light, engaging format.
Each episode features exclusive field reports on crime, social conflicts, and how authorities handle these incidents.
Each episode presents in-depth reports on politics, economy, social issues, and other important events, complete with expert analysis.
Starting from getting a message from an unknown person, after tracing it, the message came from someone who was no longer there?

Tiara and Arga's honeymoon, which should have been a happy one, turned into a disaster for Tiara. Not only was Tiara betrayed by Arga, but Tiara also suspected that Arga had murdered someone to cover up his affair.
The event provides a platform for teams to test their strength, gain valuable experience, and earn important FIFA ranking points.
Each episode features true or fictional tales that convey values of kindness, love, and friendship, inviting viewers to reflect and appreciate the beautiful moments in life.

con.oti: Me & You & A Girl Name Ugly

loc.tit: Me & You & A Girl Name Ugly

loc.syn: Inspector Virat's promise of Love revolves around the life journey of Virat Chavan, a police inspector who has great responsibilities in his duties, but also has to deal with major dilemmas in his personal life.
India's top spy Tiger and his love Zoya battle the dark world of intelligence and espionage that forbids its soldiers from loving the enemy.

Setelah kematian ibunya, Jhanak terpaksa menikahi tunangan sepupunya Arshi, Aniruddh, untuk melarikan diri dari penguntitnya, Tejas. Meskipun Aniruddh dan Arshi telah bersama selama tujuh tahun, Jhanak memasuki kehidupan mereka dalam keadaan yang menyedihkan dan mulai bekerja sebagai pembantu di rumah tangga Bose. Sementara beberapa anggota keluarga memperlakukannya dengan baik, yang lain terus-menerus menghina dan meremehkannya.

The fate of the three Brar cousins Angad, Garry and Veer are linked with the three Monga sisters Sahiba, Seerat and Keerat. Sahiba is the hardworking and independent second daughter of the Monga family. She is an artist and earns money for her family by selling her art. Seerat, the eldest Monga sister, is pampered by her mother, Santosh, for her beauty. Santosh dreams of getting Seerat married to a rich man. As fate would have it, Angad falls in love with Seerat. However, Seerat is manipulated by Garry and his fake love. On Seerat and Angad's wedding day, Seerat runs away with Garry.
A happy go-lucky Vasudha joins business leader Chandrika's house as a maid and craves her approval despite their ideological differences. Will she find acceptance in Chandrika's world?
In the grip of a painful event that happens to Ratna, Rhoma decides to redeem himself in a village, which leads him to encounter and fall in love with Sumi.
